notes: SHIP v1.14.234 — FORGE HYBRID AISLE v2.9.2, Ship 2 (VERIFY WRITEBACK). Builds on the .233 device-verified read-only aisle. Lights up the real field-verify workflow: tap a component row in the detail/verify panel -> toggles RACKED<->PENDING -> writes the per-node status store -> live 3D gut re-bake -> counts refresh everywhere -> undo toast (4s). NEW STORE: phantom_node_status_v1 (localStorage, try/catch-guarded via the module's store helper), keyed by rackId|dns (e.g. 'c1:001|GPU-9VZ-03'). KEY DECISION (John-approved): serials are absent fleet-wide (~4143 hosts, zero serials) so the old Part-A 'serial-keyed' plan was DEAD ON ARRIVAL — keyed by hostname(dns) instead, with 'U'+uStart fallback for the rare host with no dns. Status thus follows the DEVICE identity, so on a Master re-merge a device that moved U keeps its verified status. D2 RESOLVED + BAKED IN: field-verify is authoritative; a future import-status conflict is FLAGGED never silently overwritten (no import-status source exists today, so the store is pure field-truth — the rule is latent-correct for the day NetBox/import brings status in). HONEST DEFAULT: a node absent from the store = 'pending' (planned in the Master, not yet field-verified as racked) — the burn-down starts all-pending and the tech racks them one by one. UN-NEUTRALIZED from Ship 1: real RACKED/PENDING badges (was em-dash), racked/total counts in the herotag + detail meta + footer, chip fill bars + picker fill bars driven by racked%, gut trays render solid (racked) vs ghosted (pending), detail hint back to 'TAP A ROW TO TOGGLE RACKED / PENDING'. Undo reverses the toggle + store write + re-bake. CSS re-added under the scoped prefix: .chip .bar/.bar i/.active .bar i, .pick .pbar i, chip padding restored. NO Master GEOMETRY WRITE — status lives in the SEPARATE overlay store, Master stays read-only (honesty-lock 'merge never overwrite' preserved). Reuses the .233 scene/lifecycle/teardown unchanged (module re-spliced in place; FACE_B64 untouched). body.rd-only, ?legacy=1 byte-identical. Gates: node --check all inline blocks + sw.js, CSS braces balanced, CRLF preserved, three-stamp .233->.234. DEVICE-VERIFY (HARD STOP, John iPhone): (1) open FORGE 3D, focus a rack, tap it -> detail panel; every row shows a real RACKED or PENDING badge (fresh Master = all PENDING = amber/ghosted guts); (2) tap a row -> flips PENDING->RACKED, badge changes in place, the 3D gut tray for that node goes solid/bright live, counts (meta 'N/M RACKED', footer, herotag, chip bar) all bump; (3) undo toast reverses everything; (4) toggle several, close the sheet, RE-OPEN (or fully relaunch the PWA) -> the racked/pending states PERSIST (phantom_node_status_v1); (5) chip fill bars + picker racked/total reflect real progress; (6) re-open lifecycle still crash-free (Ship-1 teardown unchanged); (7) ?legacy=1 unaffected. Ship 2 CLOSES the core v2.9.2 verify feature. Deferred backlog (§11, not in scope): QR deep-link, search jump-to-U, site-profile row parsing, surfacing the verify log (Shift Handoff), fault status (red), Work-tab '3D' pill production placement.
